# Changelog entries (by date + engineering system)

Entries are grouped by **`YYYY-MM-DD-<engineering-system-folder>/`** — the same path segment as under [pull-requests/](../pull-requests/README.md) and [code-review/](../code-review/README.md). **One `CHANGELOG.md` per folder:** if multiple projects merge that day for that system, use multiple `##` sections in that file.

**Master index:** [SLICE_LAYOUT.md](../SLICE_LAYOUT.md)

**New activity:** create the dated + system folder, add `CHANGELOG.md` (from [CHANGELOG_ENTRY_TEMPLATE.md](./CHANGELOG_ENTRY_TEMPLATE.md)), append a new `##` section when another project lands **the same day** for the **same** system.

| Folder | `CHANGELOG.md` |
| ------ | -------------- |
| `2026-03-26-multimodal-knowledge-artifact-factory` | [CHANGELOG.md](./2026-03-26-multimodal-knowledge-artifact-factory/CHANGELOG.md) (P01 + P02) |
| `2026-03-27-multimodal-knowledge-artifact-factory` | [CHANGELOG.md](./2026-03-27-multimodal-knowledge-artifact-factory/CHANGELOG.md) |
| `2026-03-28-multimodal-knowledge-artifact-factory` | [CHANGELOG.md](./2026-03-28-multimodal-knowledge-artifact-factory/CHANGELOG.md) |
| `2026-03-28-retrieval-backbone-for-multi-domain-knowledge-systems` | [CHANGELOG.md](./2026-03-28-retrieval-backbone-for-multi-domain-knowledge-systems/CHANGELOG.md) |
| `2026-03-29-retrieval-backbone-for-multi-domain-knowledge-systems` | [CHANGELOG.md](./2026-03-29-retrieval-backbone-for-multi-domain-knowledge-systems/CHANGELOG.md) (P02 [PR #7](https://github.com/RoyPiring/agentic-systems-engineering/pull/7) + P03 follow-on; P03 validation **PASS**) |

The repo-root [CHANGELOG.md](../../CHANGELOG.md) stays a short **human digest** with links into these files.
